name: care-gap-item
title: Care Gap Item
description: One open care gap / health-maintenance item — a status-tinted rail, the measure name (with a Tooltip naming the program), a due line, and a quick action. Overdue reads first.

props.name: measure
props.description: Measure program/code (e.g. HEDIS/USPSTF), disclosed in a Tooltip on the name.

clinicalNotes: Care gaps drive preventive and value-based care, so the visual weight is deliberately ordered: overdue = destructive, due = warning, scheduled = info, satisfied = success — the same shared tone system used across medcn. The colored left rail lets a long list be scanned for overdue items at a glance, and status is always doubled with a text badge (never color alone). The underlying quality measure (HEDIS/USPSTF/CMS) is disclosed on hover so the clinician can see why the gap is flagged.
notes: Layer-M1 atom (core gap). Feeds CareGapsPanel (M2) and the Consumer dashboard block.
